hero.title: Coaching services that move your next role
hero.subtitle: From fast brand upgrades to deep strategy, every package is built to increase interviews, strengthen your signal, and help you land the right offer.
hero.metaTitle: Coaching Services That Move Your Next Role | Askia
hero.metaDescription: Outcome‑focused coaching services across resume, LinkedIn, interviews, and offer strategy.

tiers.title: Resume Rebuild
tiers.body: A sharp, impact‑driven resume that signals seniority and gets decision‑maker replies.
tiers.ideal: Best for: quick upgrade + clearer positioning

bullets.label: Role targeting intake
bullets.detailBody: We start with a quick intake to pin down the role family, level, and hiring criteria you want to signal.

bullets.label: Impact‑driven bullets
bullets.detailBody: We rewrite your bullets to show outcomes, scope, and ownership instead of tasks.

bullets.label: ATS‑ready formatting
bullets.detailBody: Clean structure and formatting that parses cleanly and reads fast for humans.

bullets.label: One revision round
bullets.detailBody: We do a final pass based on your feedback to lock it in.

tiers.title: Brand Refresh
tiers.body: A complete brand refresh across every recruiter touchpoint.

bullets.label: Resume rebuild
bullets.detailBody: We rebuild your resume to read senior, clear, and outcome-driven.

bullets.label: LinkedIn optimization
bullets.detailBody: We sharpen your headline, about, and experience to drive inbound interest.

bullets.label: Targeted cover letter
bullets.detailBody: A flexible cover letter framework you can tailor fast without sounding generic.

bullets.label: Two revision rounds
bullets.detailBody: Two rounds of feedback to ensure everything matches your voice and target role.

tiers.title: Brand + Career Clarity + Interview Practice
tiers.body: Everything above plus a clarity session and interview practice to sharpen your narrative.

bullets.label: Resume + LinkedIn + Cover Letter
bullets.detailBody: You get the complete brand package so every touchpoint signals the right level.

bullets.label: Career clarity coaching call
bullets.detailBody: We align role, level, and target narrative so your search has a clear spine.

bullets.label: Interview practice session
bullets.detailBody: A live session to pressure-test your story and sharpen delivery.

bullets.label: Personalized action plan
bullets.detailBody: A clear next-step plan you can execute immediately after the sprint.

items.question: Which service is right for me?
items.answer: If you need a fast resume upgrade, start with Resume Rebuild. If you want higher response rates across all channels, choose Brand Refresh. If you need clarity + interview confidence, pick the Strategy Sprint.

items.question: Do you work with senior and executive candidates?
items.answer: Yes. We support senior ICs, managers, and leaders. Ongoing or executive‑level coaching is scoped after the call.

items.question: How long does the process take?
items.answer: Most deliverables are completed within 7–14 days depending on package scope. Coaching timelines depend on availability, but most clients see momentum in 2–6 weeks.

items.question: Do you help with interviews and negotiation?
items.answer: Yes. Interview practice is included in the Strategy Sprint, and negotiation strategy is added when you’re near offers.

items.question: Will you tailor everything to my target roles?
items.answer: Yes. Every engagement begins with role targeting so your resume, LinkedIn, and narrative reflect the level and type of role you want next.

items.question: Do you guarantee results?
items.answer: We don’t promise outcomes we can’t control, but we do guarantee a clear, strategic plan and materials aligned to the market you’re targeting.

items.question: Can I combine services?
items.answer: Absolutely. Many clients start with Brand Refresh and then add coaching when interviews begin. We can build a custom path.

cta.title: Not sure which path fits?
cta.body: Book a quick call and we’ll help you choose the best option for your goals.
